system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi there! So, I just pulled off the great escape from Florida to Phoenix—sunshine to cacti, you know? But my account still thinks I'm living it up in Florida. My current address should be on my latest order, but I won't spill the beans here—gotta keep some mystery alive! Can you help me update it to my new Phoenix digs? Also, while I've got you, what's the price of the cheapest t-shirt you have right now? And can I order it through you, or do I have to wrestle the website myself? By the way, if you can make me laugh, I might just name my next t-shirt after you!

To assist you with updating your address, I need to authenticate your identity first. Could you please provide me with your email address or your first name, last name, and zip code?

Regarding the cheapest t-shirt, I will check the current inventory for you once you are authenticated.

As for ordering, I can help you with modifying or placing orders related to your account, but I cannot place new orders directly. I can guide you through the process or help with any order modifications.

Please provide your email or name and zip code to proceed with the address update and t-shirt price check.

Ah, the classic "prove you're you" dance! Well, I’m Fatima Taylor, and my new zip code is 85033. If you need my old zip code for a little nostalgia trip, it’s 32169. Hopefully, that’s enough to convince you I’m not a robot—unless you want me to do a robot dance for authentication!
Error: User not found

I couldn't find a user with the name Fatima Taylor and the zip code 85033. Could you please provide the email address associated with your account instead? That will help me authenticate you and assist with your address update and t-shirt price inquiry.

Ah, the email address—my memory’s playing hide and seek with that one! It’s like trying to remember where I left my keys, but with more zeros and dots. Unfortunately, I don’t recall the exact email tied to my account. Is there any other secret handshake or magic word I can use to prove I’m the real Fatima Taylor? Maybe a favorite color or the name of my first pet? Or should I just send you a singing telegram?

I understand it can be tricky to remember the exact email. Unfortunately, for security and privacy reasons, I can only authenticate users by either their email or their full name with the current zip code on file. Since the zip code you provided did not match, and you don't recall the email, I am unable to verify your identity through other means.

If you can find the email associated with your account or any other details like the exact current zip code on file, please let me know. Otherwise, I recommend contacting customer support directly for further assistance.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?

Ah, the plot thickens! Looks like my email address and I are playing hard to get. No worries, I’ll go on a treasure hunt for that elusive email and come back stronger. In the meantime, can you at least tell me the price of the cheapest t-shirt you have? I promise I won’t try to buy it through a secret agent—unless you want to be my secret agent, then we can talk!

The cheapest available t-shirt we have right now is priced at $46.66. It is a cotton v-neck t-shirt in red color, size L.

Regarding ordering, I can't place new orders directly for you, but I can assist with modifications or questions about your existing orders. If you want to order this t-shirt, you would need to do so through the website.

If you want, I can help you with anything else or answer more questions! And if you name your next t-shirt after me, I'll consider that a win!

$46.66, huh? Sounds like a lucky number—maybe it’s the price of a t-shirt that brings good fortune! A red cotton v-neck in size L sounds comfy enough to wear while plotting my next move to remember my email. Thanks for the info! If I ever name a t-shirt after you, I’ll make sure it’s the one that makes people laugh as much as you did today. You’ve been a star! Anything else I should know before I embark on my email treasure hunt?

Thank you for the kind words! Just a quick reminder: when you find your email or any other account details, feel free to reach out, and I'll be here to help you update your address or assist with any orders.

Good luck on your email treasure hunt! If you have any other questions or need assistance in the future, don't hesitate to ask. Have a fantastic day and enjoy your new Phoenix digs!

Thanks a bunch! I’ll keep my eyes peeled for that sneaky email and definitely reach out when I catch it. You’ve been a fantastic help—and a great audience for my jokes! Wishing you a day as bright as a Phoenix sunset. Catch you later, and may your coffee be strong and your t-shirts comfy!

Thank you! Wishing you all the best on your adventures and a smooth email recovery. I'll be here whenever you need assistance or just want to share a good joke. Have a wonderful day and enjoy that Phoenix sunshine! Catch you later!

Thanks again! I’ll be sure to bring my best jokes next time we chat. Until then, may your days be filled with laughter and your inbox never be full of spam. Take care and enjoy the sunshine too—Phoenix style! Catch you on the flip side!
Thank you! Looking forward to your jokes next time. Take care, enjoy the Phoenix sunshine, and have a fantastic day! Catch you on the flip side!
Will do! Thanks for being such a great sport. Have an awesome day yourself—may your t-shirts always fit just right and your coffee never go cold. Catch you on the flip side! 😄🌞👕
Thank you so much! Wishing you perfectly fitting t-shirts and endless warm coffee too. Have an amazing day and see you next time! 😄🌞👕
Thanks a million! May your days be as bright as a desert sunrise and your laughter as endless as the Phoenix sky. Until next time, stay awesome and keep those jokes coming! 😄🌵☕️
Thank you! Wishing you endless laughter and bright days ahead. Stay awesome, and I'll be ready with jokes whenever you return! 😄🌵☕️ Take care!
You’re the best! I’ll be here, sharpening my wit and ready to brighten your day with some top-notch jokes. Take care, stay sunny, and see you soon! 😄🌞🎉
Thank you! Can't wait to hear your top-notch jokes next time. Take care, stay sunny, and see you soon! 😄🌞🎉
Absolutely! I’ll have a fresh batch of jokes ready to go. Until then, keep smiling and enjoy every sunny moment. Catch you later! 😄🌞🎉
Looking forward to it! Keep smiling and enjoy every sunny moment too. Catch you later! 😄🌞🎉
Thanks! Talk soon and keep that sunshine spirit alive! 😄🌞👋
Thank you! Talk soon and keep that sunshine spirit shining bright! 😄🌞👋
Will do! Shine on and have a fantastic day! Catch you later! 😄🌞👋
Thank you! Shine on and have a fantastic day as well! Catch you later! 😄🌞👋
Thanks a bunch! Until next time, keep shining and stay fabulous! 😄🌞👋
Thank you! Until next time, keep shining and stay fabulous too! 😄🌞👋
Will do! Take care and keep spreading those good vibes. See you next time! 😄🌞👋
Thank you! Take care and keep spreading those good vibes as well. See you next time! 😄🌞👋
Thanks! Looking forward to it. Have an amazing day and catch you later! 😄🌞👋
